phrases.intent_en: Where are the Sufi Trail markers?
phrases.cultural_note: Trail markers in an open neighborhood area are best confirmed locally.

likely_response.translation_en: At the beginning of the stone houses.

responses.english: At the beginning of the stone houses.

phrases.intent_en: Is there parking at the village edge?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking fee is unverified; the attendant is the best source.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is at the entrance.

responses.english: Yes, there is at the entrance.

phrases.cultural_note: The stable target is the former Greek village quarter; exact lanes are unverified.

likely_response.local: Danışmaya sorun, eski Rum mahallesi civarındadır.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at information, they are around the former Greek quarter.

responses.english: Ask at information, they are around the former Greek quarter.
responses.local: Danışmaya sorun, eski Rum mahallesi civarındadır.

phrases.intent_en: Do I need cash for tea gardens?
phrases.text_local: Çay bahçeleri için nakit gerekli mi?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment method is unverified; asking the tea server (çaycı) is the most direct approach.

likely_response.local: Evet, eski köyde nakit gerekli, ATM yok.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, cash is needed in the old village, there is no ATM.

responses.english: Yes, cash is needed in the old village, there is no ATM.
responses.local: Evet, eski köyde nakit gerekli, ATM yok.

phrases.intent_en: Is there parking at the village edge?
phrases.cultural_note: A direct yes/no is avoided as the parking fee situation is unverified.
Stone houses are a general feature of the village; their specific location is unverified.
Staff at unverified locations may be referred to by their role, like bekçi (keeper).

likely_response.translation_en: Up the street, on the right.

responses.english: Up the street, on the right.
